title: Luffy Enters the War

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Maybe you aren't, but I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Captain Roger!!! Our lives are more important!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sorry, but he's in great shape.
